creator: nickblack@linux.com
text:
Created attachment 228201
git diff 2.4.2 -> 2.4.3

https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.4.3

While almost annoyingly small, this release was necessitated by numerous terminals inverting their semantics for DECSDM (see release notes above). It is necessary for correct function of Sixels in XTerm 369+ among others.
